description_long: This nightstand features a semi-circular wooden top and body, supported by three straight, tapered wooden legs. The front face includes a single, slightly recessed drawer with a contrasting light-colored panel and a prominent round metallic knob at its center. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a warm, natural appearance, while the drawer front adds a modern touch with its smooth, painted finish. The back and sides are plain, with the wood finish uninterrupted except for the structural seams. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative carvings or embellishments, focusing on clean lines and functional form. The nightstand is compact, making it suitable for placement in tight spaces or alongside other furniture.
description: A compact, semi-circular wooden nightstand with three tapered legs and a single front drawer featuring a round metallic knob. The design is minimalist, with a contrasting light drawer front and visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the semi-circular shape, single light-colored drawer with a round metallic knob, and three tapered legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved wooden top, the depth of the nightstand, and the protruding round knob.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden back and the three-leg configuration without any drawer or handle visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the curved profile, the side of the drawer, and the round knob extending outward.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or beside a bed
